chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No. 71 of 2015 _____________________________________________________ Date Order.with signature of Judge D/o matter For order on CMA No.09/2023 (u/o XLI R 19) 28.11.2023 Mr. Naved Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent No.1......... This appeal claims to have been dismissed twice on 13.04.2016 and 15.12.2022. Earlier dismissal order was recalled, however, it was yet again dismissed as recorded above. This is an application before us for restoration and appellant’s counsel is not in attendance. Dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Ashraf
